title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you think you live in a good area? What makes it good or bad?
How important is it to live close to the city centre?
Would you ever consider moving to a different city for work?
What facilities do you think are most important in a neighbourhood?
Do you prefer living in a house or a flat? Why?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think cities should prioritise green spaces or housing development?
Is it important to you to have a sense of community where you live?
What do you think the ideal city of the future would look like?
